title: batatas senegalensis
intro: Batatas senegalensis, also known as African potato, is a plant species that belongs to the Smilacaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of saponins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Batatas senegalensis include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In traditional herbal medicine, Batatas senegalensis is often prepared by boiling its roots or leaves in water to make a decoction or tea, which is then used to treat various health conditions.
